CreateHaVip.clientToken: Idempotency token, ASCII string up to 64 characters, see [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
CreateHaVip.name: HA VIP name; allowed: letters, digits, Chinese characters, and -_/. symbols; must start with a letter or Chinese character; length 1–65
CreateHaVip.subnetId: Subnet ID to which the HA VIP belongs
CreateHaVip.privateIpAddress: Specified IP address; empty string means auto-assign
